dashboard.title: Dashboard
dashboard.subtitle: See symbols matching your strategy conditions and your performance at a glance.

empty.title: No strategies yet
empty.body: Describe your trading principles in plain language and AI turns them into verifiable rules.

dashboard.kpiNoBacktest: You have strategies but no saved backtests, so performance is not shown.
dashboard.guestHint: Sign in to aggregate your strategies and performance.
dashboard.disclaimer: Performance shown is based on historical data and does not guarantee future returns. You remain the sole decision-maker.

chart.title: Chart evidence
chart.noRef: No reference candle within the shown range.
chart.evidenceNote: The zones shown are not a buy directive — they display your strategy's reference candle and buy/stop zones as evidence.

strategies.desc: Manage your strategies and their immutable version history. Each version keeps its change summary and performance.
strategies.title: Strategies
strategies.needLogin: Sign in to view your strategies.
strategies.empty: No saved strategies yet. Create one in AI Strategy Chat and save it.

backtest.desc: Out-of-sample split and walk-forward by default. Win rate, avg return, MDD and holding days shown with method, period and sample size.
backtest.guard: Structurally blocks overfitting, look-ahead and survivorship bias (backtest guard).
backtest.sampleNote: The results below use a demo sample series, not real market data. For real data, enter a symbol code below and run on Kiwoom daily candles.
backtest.realNote: Kiwoom REST daily candles (adjusted). Quote lookup only, not order placement.
backtest.disclaimer: Performance is based on past/sample data and does not guarantee future returns. Always read the out-of-sample metrics.
backtest.saveResultNeedStrategy: Select a saved strategy to keep results as history.

scanner.desc: Evaluates a list of symbols against your strategy conditions to find ones that currently match. Based on Kiwoom daily candles.

picker.label: Select symbols to scan (max {max})
picker.costNote: Each symbol costs one quote lookup, so scans are capped at {max}.

scanner.needLogin: Sign in to scan with a saved strategy. (Sample strategy works without login.)
scanner.disclaimer: Results are not stock recommendations but a match check against your own strategy conditions. You remain the decision-maker.

alerts.desc: Symbols you saved from the scanner. Keeps the signal and evidence snapshot from when you saved.
alerts.needLogin: Sign in to view your watchlist.
alerts.empty: No saved symbols yet. Save some from the scanner.
alerts.pushSoon: Real-time push alerts are coming. For now, saved snapshots are kept and listed.

trades.desc: System-trading log that places orders only when your defined conditions are met. Opens after regulatory review.

marketplace.desc: Share and subscribe to strategies. Not opened until advisory-classification is confirmed.

aiChat.title: AI Strategy Chat
aiChat.subtitle: Describe your trading principles in plain language; we ask for missing conditions and turn them into verifiable rules (DSL).
aiChat.placeholder: e.g. After a big candle up 20%+, I want to buy in splits on the pullback
aiChat.intro: Describe your strategy in words. The AI asks for missing conditions by number. (This formalizes your conditions into rules — it is not a stock recommendation.)
aiChat.saveNote: The rule is validated. Name and save it to keep it as a version in your strategy list.
aiChat.saved: Saved · see it in your strategy list
aiChat.notConfigured: AI chat is unavailable because OPENAI_API_KEY is not set. Check server environment variables.
aiChat.error: Something went wrong handling the AI response.
aiChat.disclaimer: AI output is a formalization of your own strategy conditions, not investment advice or a stock recommendation. You remain the decision-maker.

priceColor.title: Up/down colors
priceColor.desc: Choose the colors for gains/losses. Korean convention is up=red; US style is up=green. (Separate from system status colors.)

kiwoom.title: Kiwoom Securities
kiwoom.desc: Kiwoom REST API app key/secret are stored only on the server and never exposed to the browser.

login.title: Sign in
login.subtitle: Sign in to save your strategies.
login.notConfigured: Firebase auth is not configured. Check environment variables.
login.toggleToSignIn: Already have an account? Sign in

errors.forbidden: You do not have permission to access this page.
errors.generic: Something went wrong. Please try again later.
